## Checklist

- [ ] One concern per PR (refactors split from feature work, doc fixes split from code fixes)
- [ ] If you added a skill/pattern doc, it follows the existing `skills/` shape
- [ ] If you touched the starter scaffold, you ran `bash -n bootstrap.sh` and `node --check` on changed JS
- [ ] If you added a migration, you ran `sqlite3 :memory: ".read migrations/000X_*.sql"` to confirm it parses
- [ ] You're OK with this contribution being licensed under PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0 (same as the rest of the repo)
